productModules.name: Forge RMS
productModules.subtitle: Records Management System
productModules.description: Complete incident and records management. NFIRS-compliant reporting, narrative tools, and seamless data flow from dispatch to documentation.

productModules.name: Forge Personnel
productModules.subtitle: Personnel Management
productModules.description: Scheduling, staffing, certifications, and accountability — all connected. Manage your entire workforce from a single dashboard.

productModules.name: Forge Training
productModules.subtitle: Training Management
productModules.description: Training management and compliance tracking. Assign, track, and verify training across your entire department with automated compliance alerts.

productModules.name: Forge Prevention
productModules.subtitle: Fire Prevention
productModules.description: Inspections and prevention workflows built for modern fire prevention bureaus. Manage inspections, violations, and community risk reduction.

productModules.name: Forge Fleet
productModules.subtitle: Fleet & Asset Management
productModules.description: Fleet and asset readiness at your fingertips. Track maintenance schedules, apparatus status, and equipment inventory across every station.

productModules.name: Forge Analytics
productModules.subtitle: Operational Intelligence
productModules.description: Executive dashboards and performance metrics that transform raw operational data into strategic decisions. Real-time KPIs for every level of command.

productModules.name: Forge Command
productModules.subtitle: Incident Command
productModules.description: Operational command and incident awareness for every mission. Real-time unit tracking, ICS integration, and situational awareness tools.
